# Torgin Brimbleblast

If it works, it’s genius. If it doesn’t… well, it’s still impressive.

> **Ancestry:** Goblin
> **Community:** Ridgeborne
> **Role:** Laborer / Alchemist

## Features

**Pressured:** Whenever an ally rolls with Fear on their Duality Dice, **place 1 token** on this card.

**Unstable Charge:** **Spend 3 tokens** to have _Torgin_ throw an explosive at an adversary within Far range, dealing **2d8** physical damage. After the attack, roll 1d6:

- 1: the adversary immediately takes an action

- 2–4: nothing happens

- 5–6: the adversary becomes Vulnerable temporarily, and you place 1 token on this card.
